title: Fleischtheke's - Minecraft Trailer Pack
description: Bring the cinematic visuals of Minecraft’s update trailers to your gameplay. This modpack enhances graphics, lighting, and animations to deliver an immersive experience, perfect for creators and players seeking a polished, trailer-like aesthetic.
body:
![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc32c4633ea8b5f5f89dcbc05853c538a864cb77.png)

**Fleischtheke's - Minecraft Trailer Pack** brings the cinematic visuals and immersive atmosphere of official Minecraft update trailers to your gameplay experience. Designed for both casual players and creators, this modpack enhances the visual quality of Minecraft while preserving its iconic style.

## Features
- **Enhanced Graphics and Lighting:**  
  Experience dynamic lighting, realistic shadows, and vibrant colors with pre-configured shaders and resource packs.  

- **Smooth Animations:**  
  Achieve the polished look and fluidity of official Minecraft trailers.  

- **Perfect for Content Creators:**  
  Whether you're creating cinematic scenes, building showcase videos, or just enjoying a beautifully enhanced world, this modpack is tailored for you.  

- **Pre-Configured for Simplicity:**  
  Easy installation with optimized settings ensures that anyone can start enjoying the trailer-style experience right away.  

## Why Download This Modpack?
This modpack is ideal for players who:  
- Love the look and feel of Minecraft’s official trailers.  
- Want to elevate their gameplay visuals and atmosphere.  
- Create content and need a polished, cinematic aesthetic.  
- Enjoy building or exploring in an immersive, vibrant world. 

## Included Mods
This modpack includes a carefully curated selection of mods to achieve its trailer-like aesthetic. Below is the full list of dependencies:  

- **[Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api)** 
- **[Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium)**  
- **[YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)**
- **[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)** 
- **[libIPN](https://modrinth.com/mod/libipn)**
- **[Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)** 
- **[Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)** 
- **[Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-shadowy-path-blocks)**
- **[Better Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-animations)**
- **[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)**  
- **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**  
- **[Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)**
- **[Particular ✨](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular)**
- **[AmbientSounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambientsounds)**
- **[Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/mod/bare-bones)** 
- **[Bare Bones x Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/bare-bones-x-fresh-animations)**
- **[owo-lib (oωo)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib)** 
- **[ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)**
- **[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)**
- **[Make Bubbles Pop](https://modrinth.com/mod/make_bubbles_pop)**
- **[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)**
- **[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)**
- **[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)**
- **[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options)**
- **[Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)** 
- **[Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/fresh-animations)**
- **[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)**
- **[Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps)**  
- **[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)**
- **[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)**
- **[ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod)**  
- **[Amplified Nether](https://modrinth.com/mod/amplified-nether)** 
- **[Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations)**
- **[CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore)**
- **[Cave Dust](https://modrinth.com/mod/cave-dust)**
- **[Entity Model Features (EMF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)** 
- **[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**  
- **[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)**  
- **[Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)**  
- **[Entity Texture Features (ETF)](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**
- **[BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/bsl-shaders)**
